annualized_xirr_note: Annualized XIRR is a dated cash-flow diagnostic from mock data, not a forecast.
security_pnl_basis: Sample security P&L is calculated in each security's source currency, then translated to KRW at sell-date FX for realized P&L and as-of FX for unrealized P&L; it is not a historical-FX cost-basis or tax-lot statement.
